description: A vessel has completed cargo operations and is ready to depart. The operator must coordinate its sailing.

nodes.task_description: Receive the Estimated Time of Departure (ETD) from the vessel's agent.

expected_outcome.value: Operator receives and logs the ETD.

nodes.task_description: Schedule pilot, tugs, and mooring gang services for the ETD.

expected_outcome.value: All necessary departure services are booked in the system.

nodes.task_description: Notify the Vessel Traffic Service (VTS) of the planned departure to ensure a clear channel.

expected_outcome.value: The VTS acknowledges the sailing plan and confirms the departure window.
